title: Build FF PAYALUGA Free Fire Tournament Platform

requirements.text: Implement user authentication system with email and password registration. Upon successful registration, automatically generate and assign a unique User ID to each user. Store user credentials, email, and generated ID in the backend.

quotes: Users must register using: Email, Password
A unique User ID should be automatically generated

acceptanceCriteria: Users can register with email and password
System generates unique User ID automatically on registration
Users can log in with registered credentials
User ID is stored and retrievable from backend

requirements.text: Create a wallet system for each user with coin balance tracking. Implement deposit functionality where users can enter amounts between ₹10 and ₹100. Display a Google Pay QR code when user submits a deposit request. Store pending deposit requests with amount and timestamp.

quotes: Users must have a wallet system
Minimum deposit: ₹10, Maximum deposit: ₹100
My Google Pay QR code should be displayed

acceptanceCriteria: Each user has a wallet with coin balance initialized to 0
Deposit form validates minimum ₹10 and maximum ₹100
Google Pay QR code displays after deposit amount submission
Pending deposits are stored with user ID, amount, and timestamp

requirements.text: Build admin deposit verification system. Admin can view all pending deposit requests with user details and submitted amounts. Admin can approve deposits and manually add equivalent coins to user wallets using 1₹ = 1 Coin conversion rate.

quotes: Admin will manually verify payment
Admin can add equivalent coins to user wallet
Coins should match deposited amount (1₹ = 1 Coin)

acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel displays list of pending deposit requests
Each request shows user ID, amount, and timestamp
Admin can approve deposits with one-click action
Approved deposits add coins to user wallet at 1₹ = 1 Coin rate
Deposit status updates from pending to approved

requirements.text: Implement tournament join system for Free Fire Clash Squad 1v1 mode. Users must provide their Free Fire UID and WhatsApp phone number when joining. Automatically deduct the tournament entry fee from user's wallet balance. Send user UID, phone number, and join timestamp to admin dashboard instantly.

quotes: Users can join tournament using wallet coins
User must provide: Free Fire UID, WhatsApp phone number
Tournament entry fee should be automatically deducted from wallet
User UID and phone number must be sent to admin dashboard instantly

acceptanceCriteria: Tournament join form collects Free Fire UID and WhatsApp number
System validates user has sufficient wallet balance before allowing join
Entry fee is deducted from wallet balance upon successful join
User join details (UID, phone number, timestamp) appear in admin dashboard immediately
Users cannot join if wallet balance is insufficient

requirements.text: Create comprehensive admin control panel with user management, tournament configuration, and match scheduling. Admin can view all registered users with their IDs, manage tournament status (Open/Closed), set tournament entry fee, set match time, and customize match schedule. Admin can view all tournament join requests with player UID and WhatsApp numbers.

quotes: Admin must be able to: View all registered users, View user IDs
Set tournament entry fee, Set match time, Customize match schedule
Manage tournament status (Open / Closed)
See player UID + WhatsApp number

acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel displays complete list of registered users with their unique IDs
Admin can view all tournament join requests with UID and phone numbers
Admin can set and update tournament entry fee amount
Admin can configure match time and schedule
Admin can toggle tournament status between Open and Closed
Only open tournaments accept new join requests

requirements.text: Design and implement Free Fire gaming themed UI with dark background throughout the application. Use gaming-style elements including animated buttons, esports-inspired layouts, and Free Fire visual motifs. Ensure all pages are fully mobile responsive with touch-friendly controls and adaptive layouts.

quotes: Full Free Fire gaming theme
Dark background, Gaming UI style, Animated buttons
Mobile responsive design
Attractive esports layout

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use dark background color scheme
Buttons have hover and click animations
Visual design reflects Free Fire gaming aesthetic
Layout is fully responsive on mobile devices (320px to 480px widths)
Touch targets are appropriately sized for mobile interaction
All text is readable on dark backgrounds

requirements.text: Create six-page application structure: Home page (landing/welcome), Login/Register page (authentication forms), Dashboard (user overview with wallet balance and tournament status), Wallet/Deposit page (deposit form and transaction history), Tournament Page (join form and active tournaments), and Admin Panel (user management, deposit verification, tournament control).

quotes: Home, Login / Register, Dashboard, Wallet / Deposit, Tournament Page, Admin Panel

acceptanceCriteria: Home page welcomes users and provides navigation
Login/Register page handles authentication
Dashboard displays user wallet balance and tournament information
Wallet/Deposit page allows deposits and shows transaction history
Tournament Page displays available tournaments and join functionality
Admin Panel accessible only to admin users with full management controls

constraints: Use Free Fire Clash Squad 1v1 mode only
Coin conversion rate must be exactly 1₹ = 1 Coin
Deposit verification must be manual by admin
Room ID and password distribution handled manually by admin via WhatsApp
nonGoals: Automatic deposit verification or payment gateway integration
Automated room creation in Free Fire
Match result tracking or scoring system
Public tournament listings or search functionality
Multi-game support beyond Free Fire Clash Squad 1v1

required: Free Fire themed hero banner with dark gaming aesthetic and esports elements (ff-hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Google Pay QR code placeholder for deposit payments (gpay-qr-code.dim_300x300.png)
Free Fire logo for branding throughout the application (ff-logo.dim_200x200.png)
Dark gaming background texture for page backgrounds (gaming-bg-texture.dim_1920x1080.png)
Tournament icon with Free Fire Clash Squad theme (tournament-icon.dim_128x128.png)
Wallet/coin icon matching Free Fire visual style (wallet-icon.dim_128x128.png)
